name: Vladimir Putin
bio: Vladimir Putin has served as President of Russia since 2000 (with a brief period as Prime Minister 2008–2012). He ordered the full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022 and has been the central figure in Russia's ongoing war. A US-brokered ceasefire (May 9–11 2026) was the first meaningful pause in the conflict since the full-scale invasion began.

quotes.text: Russia's war on Ukraine may be coming to an end. I am willing to meet Zelenskyy in a third country if a peace deal is finalized.
